generated_oml:
instance Vehicle : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Complete automobile system for transportation"
]

instance Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural component providing support for vehicle systems"
]

instance Wheels : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Rotating components enabling vehicle mobility"
]

instance Powertrain : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "System generating power and transmitting it to wheels"
]

instance TransportationEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Vehicle, Chassis, Wheels, Powertrain
]

instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring rotational speed of vehicle wheels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance EngineTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring temperature of the vehicle's engine powertrain"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EngineTempDataTransmitted
]

instance ChassisVibrationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring vibrations in the vehicle chassis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ChassisVibrationDataTransmitted
]

instance WheelSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]

instance EngineTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EngineTemperatureSensor
]

instance ChassisVibrationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChassisVibrationSensor
]

instance WheelSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous stream of wheel speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance EngineTempData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous stream of engine temperature measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EngineTempDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimator, FaultDetector
]

instance ChassisVibrationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous stream of chassis vibration measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ChassisVibrationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimator, FaultDetector
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of vehicle physical dimensions using CAD data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveSimulator, StateEstimator
]

instance DynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model using differential equations to simulate system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveSimulator, StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model integrating cyber and physical aspects for system analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetector, Optimizer
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting anomalies and faults in vehicle systems using sensor data and analytical models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm estimating current state of vehicle systems from sensor data and dynamic models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm optimizing operational parameters based on simulation and analysis of models and data"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance PredictiveSimulator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm simulating future behavior under varying conditions using dynamic and geometric models"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for automated adjustments to maintain system safety and performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system safety and performance through sensor data analysis and state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyInsight, PerformanceInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulations to forecast physical twin behavior under varying operational conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides FutureStateInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational parameters for efficiency improvements and safety"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalParametersInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection via specialized algorithms for identifying system anomalies and triggering corrective actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight, ManualModificationAction
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control for automated adjustments to vehicle systems based on real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomaticAdjustmentAction
]

instance SafetyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of system safety status based on current models and sensor data"
]

instance PerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Evaluation of system performance metrics for optimization opportunities"
]

instance FutureStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted system state under various operational scenarios"
]

instance OptimalParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommended operational parameters for maximum efficiency and safety"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of anomalies or faults in vehicle components"
]

instance AutomaticAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to vehicle systems based on supervisory control decisions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ManualModificationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human-initiated modifications to physical twin based on fault detection insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
